hero.title: Corporate Rolls-Royce Rentals
hero.subtitle: Elevate Your Business Image in Dubai
hero.description: Impress clients, reward executives, and travel in unparalleled style with our corporate Rolls-Royce rental services. We provide reliable, discreet, and luxurious transportation solutions for businesses of all sizes.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us for Corporate Travel?

image.title: Impeccable Image
image.description: Arrive at meetings and events in a vehicle that reflects your company's success and standards.

productivity.title: On-the-Go Productivity
productivity.description: Our vehicles provide a quiet, comfortable environment to work or take calls while traveling.

privacy.title: Discretion & Privacy
privacy.description: Our professional chauffeurs are trained to provide the utmost discretion for all our clients.

standards.title: Reliability & High Standards
standards.description: Punctuality and pristine vehicles are guaranteed, ensuring a seamless experience every time.

executive.title: Executive Airport Transfer
executive.description: Seamless meet-and-greet service from all Dubai airports.

conference.title: Conference & Event Shuttle
conference.description: Transport your team or clients to events in coordinated luxury.

roadshow.title: Financial Roadshows
roadshow.description: Complex, multi-stop itineraries managed by our expert logistics team.

partnership.title: Long-Term Corporate Partnership
partnership.description: Retainer-based services for ongoing executive transportation needs.

clients.title: Trusted by Leading Businesses
clients.description: We are proud to serve a diverse range of corporate clients, from global enterprises to local startups.

bank.title: Global Investment Bank
bank.challenge: Needed reliable transport for a 5-day, multi-city financial roadshow for their CEO.
bank.solution: Provided a dedicated Ghost with a professional chauffeur, managing a complex schedule flawlessly.
bank.result: The CEO praised the seamless experience, allowing them to focus on critical business meetings.

tech.title: International Tech Conference
tech.challenge: Required VIP transport for 20 keynote speakers from the airport to hotels and the event venue.
tech.solution: Coordinated a fleet of 10 Phantoms and Ghosts with a central dispatcher for real-time updates.
tech.result: All speakers arrived on time and in comfort, enhancing the prestige of the event.

financial.title: Financial Benefits
financial.description: Consolidated invoicing, transparent pricing, and competitive corporate rates.

operational.title: Operational Efficiency
operational.description: Save time with our easy booking process and reliable, punctual service.

service.title: Enhanced Service
service.description: Offer a premium transportation experience to your clients and employees.

cta.title: Discuss Your Corporate Needs
cta.description: Contact our corporate accounts team today to create a bespoke transportation solution for your business.

quickInquiry.title: Quick Inquiry
quickInquiry.description: Get a fast quote for your corporate rental needs.

hero.title: Wedding Rolls-Royce Hire
hero.subtitle: Unforgettable Moments, Unforgettable Journeys
hero.description: Make your special day truly magical with the timeless elegance of a Rolls-Royce. Our wedding car hire service provides the ultimate touch of luxury and sophistication for your wedding in Dubai.

bridal.title: Elegant Bridal Arrival
bridal.description: Make a breathtaking entrance that will be remembered forever.

photo.title: Stunning Photo Opportunities
photo.description: A Rolls-Royce provides a magnificent backdrop for your wedding photos.

reliability.title: Punctual & Reliable Service
reliability.description: Our professional chauffeurs ensure you arrive on time and in style.

packages.title: Our Wedding Packages
packages.description: Choose from our curated packages or let us create a custom solution for you.

sarah.quote: The Rolls-Royce was the highlight of our wedding. The service was impeccable!

fatima.quote: Felt like royalty arriving in the Phantom. It made our photos look absolutely stunning.

cta.title: Book Your Dream Wedding Car
cta.description: Contact us to discuss your wedding plans and reserve the perfect Rolls-Royce for your big day.

birthdayPage.title: Birthday
birthdayPage.subtitle: Make their birthday unforgettable. Arrive in a decorated Rolls-Royce with champagne, flowers, and a professional chauffeur.

step1.title: Choose Package
step1.desc: Select Silver, Gold, or Platinum birthday package.

step2.title: Customize
step2.desc: Tell us the birthday person's name, age, and preferences.

step3.title: We Decorate
step3.desc: Our team prepares the car with custom decoration and champagne.

step4.title: Surprise Arrival
step4.desc: The decorated Rolls-Royce arrives at the specified location.

bestModels.title: Best Models for Birthdays
bestModels.subtitle: Our most popular birthday celebration cars

phantom.desc: The ultimate birthday car. Starlight Headliner creates a magical atmosphere. The most impressive entrance.

dawn.desc: Open-top birthday cruise. Perfect for daytime celebrations with the Dubai skyline as your backdrop.

cullinan.desc: Room for the whole party. 7 seats of luxury for group birthday celebrations and night-out adventures.

hourlyPage.title: Hourly
hourlyPage.subtitle: Luxury on your schedule. Rent any Rolls-Royce by the hour with a professional chauffeur. Minimum 2 hours.

business.title: Business Meetings
business.desc: Arrive at DIFC or Business Bay meetings in a Rolls-Royce. 2-3 hour bookings ideal for client impressions.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Arrivals
restaurant.desc: Grand arrival at Dubai's finest restaurants. Zuma, Nobu, La Petite Maison — make an entrance.

shopping.title: Shopping Trips
shopping.desc: Cruise Dubai Mall, Mall of the Emirates, or Galleria with a Rolls-Royce and chauffeur waiting.

date.title: Date Nights
date.desc: Impress with a Rolls-Royce date night. Sunset cruise on Palm Jumeirah in the Dawn convertible.

social.title: Social Media Content
social.desc: Quick content creation sessions. 2-hour packages perfect for Instagram reels and TikTok shoots.

hotel.title: Hotel Transfers
hotel.desc: Luxury transfer between hotels, venues, or residences across Dubai. Minimum 2-hour booking.

step2.title: Set Duration
step2.desc: Minimum 2 hours. Up to 6 hours at hourly rate.

step3.title: Pick Location
step3.desc: We deliver anywhere in Dubai within 30 minutes.

step4.title: Enjoy
step4.desc: Your chauffeur drives. You relax and enjoy.
